title: Frontend Batch 36 - Final Public Admin Affordance Smoke Reinforcement
summary: Completed the requested run through Batch 36 with public list create/admin affordance smoke coverage for admin-visible, anonymous-hidden, and failed-session-hidden behavior.

validation.command: npx skills find react dynamic public admin create affordance testing
validation.notes: Results were general admin/accessibility skills; no new skill was installed.
Docker Desktop WSL integration is not enabled for this distro, so full e2e was not run.

remainingGaps: Full Playwright e2e still needs Docker Desktop WSL integration or an already running backend on 127.0.0.1:8080.
Browser cookie/session transitions across full reloads remain the next browser-level validation target once e2e is available.
The next improvement cycle should consolidate recurring full-suite slow/flaky patterns before adding much more surface coverage.
recommendation: Proceed to Frontend Batch 37 - Full-Suite Stability and E2E Readiness Reinforcement only after confirming whether the post-36 stop line should continue.
